name: Piston Engine
description: Rhythmic piston strokes with mechanical drive

prompts.SessionStart: piston chime ascending with bright rhythmic mechanical tone, smooth air valve, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: piston chime descending with smooth mechanical release decay, gentle air valve tone, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: single crisp piston chime with bright mechanical ring, smooth air valve bell, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct piston tick with crisp mechanical click, smooth air valve, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: short piston chirp confirming with bright mechanical ping, smooth air valve, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two piston chime tones with questioning mechanical rhythm, smooth air valve, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady piston pulse with clear rhythmic mechanical pattern, smooth air valve, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStart: piston chime splitting into two parallel mechanical streams, smooth air valve, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStop: clear piston ping returning with distinct mechanical ring, smooth air valve, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright energetic piston chime with rapid mechanical melody, smooth air valve, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
